files.content:
---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import "@/styles/global.css"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"html">

const { class: className, lang, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<html
  class={cn("bg-background text-foreground scroll-smooth", className)}
  data-slot="layout"
  lang={Astro.currentLocale || "nl"}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</html>

export { default as Layout } from "./layout.astro"
export { default as LayoutBody } from "./layout-body.astro"
export { default as LayoutHead } from "./layout-head.astro"
export { default as LayoutMain } from "./layout-main.astro"
